parameters.query: INSERT INTO ops_events (ts, level, workflow, event_type, message, context) VALUES (NOW(), '{{$json.level}}', '{{$json.workflow}}', '{{$json.event_type}}', '{{$json.message.replace(/'/g, "''")}}', '{{JSON.stringify($json.context).replace(/'/g, "''")}}'::jsonb) RETURNING id, ts, level, workflow, event_type;
